rule_metadata.name: ft_cab
rule_metadata.author: Jason Batchelor
rule_metadata.desc: File magic for CABs (Microsoft Cabinet Files)

rules.rule_text:
rule ft_cab
{
	meta:
		author = "Jason Batchelor"
		company = "Emerson"
		lastmod = "20150723"
		desc = "File magic for CABs (Microsoft Cabinet Files)"

	strings:
		$cab = { 4D 53 43 46 }

	condition:
		$cab at 0
}

rule_metadata.name: ft_elf
rule_metadata.author: Jason Batchelor
rule_metadata.desc: File magic for ELF files

rules.rule_text:
rule ft_elf
{
	meta:
		author = "Jason Batchelor"
		company = "Emerson"
		lastmod = "20160121"
		desc = "File magic for ELF files"

	strings:
		$magic = { 7f 45 4c 46 }

	condition:
		$magic at 0
}

rule_metadata.name: ft_exe
rule_metadata.author: Jason Batchelor
rule_metadata.desc: Simple signature to trigger on PE files.

rules.rule_text:
rule ft_exe
{
	meta:
		author = "Jason Batchelor"
		company = "Emerson"
		lastmod = "20141217"
		desc = "Simple signature to trigger on PE files."

	strings:
		$mz = "MZ"

	condition:
		$mz at 0
}

rule_metadata.name: ft_gzip
rule_metadata.author: Jason Batchelor
rule_metadata.desc: Trigger on magic of GZip compressed files

rules.rule_text:
rule ft_gzip
{
	meta:
		author = "Jason Batchelor"
		company = "Emerson"
		lastmod = "20151116"
		desc = "Trigger on magic of GZip compressed files"

	strings:
		$magic = { 1f 8b 08 }

	condition:
		$magic at 0
}

rule_metadata.name: ft_jar
rule_metadata.author: Jason Batchelor
rule_metadata.desc: Signature to detect JAR files

rules.rule_text:
rule ft_jar
{
	meta:
		author = "Jason Batchelor"
		company = "Emerson"
		lastmod = "20150810"
		desc = "Signature to detect JAR files"

	strings:
		$pk_header = { 50 4B 03 04 }
		$jar = "META-INF/MANIFEST.MF"

	condition:
		$pk_header at 0 and $jar
}

rule_metadata.name: ft_java_class
rule_metadata.author: Jason Batchelor
rule_metadata.desc: File magic for detecting a Java bytecode file.

rules.rule_text:
rule ft_java_class
{
	meta:
		author = "Jason Batchelor"
		company = "Emerson"
		lastmod = "20160126"
		desc = "File magic for detecting a Java bytecode file."

	strings:
		$class = { CA FE BA BE }

	condition:
		$class at 0
}

rule_metadata.name: ft_office_open_xml
rule_metadata.author: Jason Batchelor
rule_metadata.desc: Simple metadata attribute indicative of Office Open XML format. Commonly seen in modern office files.

rules.rule_text:
rule ft_office_open_xml
{
	meta:
		author = "Jason Batchelor"
		company = "Emerson"
		lastmod = "20140915"
		desc = "Simple metadata attribute indicative of Office Open XML format. Commonly seen in modern office files."

	strings:
		$OOXML = "[Content_Types].xml"

	condition:
		$OOXML at 30
}

rule_metadata.name: ft_ole_cf
rule_metadata.author: Jason Batchelor
rule_metadata.desc: Detect file magic indicative of OLE CF files (commonly used by early versions of MS Office).

rules.rule_text:
rule ft_ole_cf
{
	meta:
		author = "Jason Batchelor"
		company = "Emerson"
		lastmod = "20141202"
		desc = "Detect file magic indicative of OLE CF files (commonly used by early versions of MS Office)."

	strings:
		$magic = { D0 CF 11 E0 A1 B1 1A E1 }

	condition:
		$magic at 0
}

rule_metadata.name: ft_pdf
rule_metadata.author: Jason Batchelor
rule_metadata.desc: Signature to trigger on PDF file magic.

rules.rule_text:
rule ft_pdf
{
	meta:
		author = "Jason Batchelor"
		company = "Emerson"
		lastmod = "20141230"
		desc = "Signature to trigger on PDF file magic."

	strings:
		$pdf = "%PDF"

	condition:
		$pdf in ( 0 .. 1024 )
}

rule_metadata.name: ft_rar
rule_metadata.author: James Ferrer
rule_metadata.desc: File type signature for basic .rar files

rules.rule_text:
rule ft_rar
{
	meta:
		author = "James Ferrer"
		company = "Emerson"
		lastmod = "20150107"
		desc = "File type signature for basic .rar files"

	strings:
		$Rar = {52 61 72 21 1A 07}

	condition:
		$Rar at 0
}

rule_metadata.name: ft_rtf
rule_metadata.author: Jason Batchelor
rule_metadata.desc: Hit on RTF files by triggering on RTF file magic

rules.rule_text:
rule ft_rtf
{
	meta:
		author = "Jason Batchelor"
		company = "Emerson"
		lastmod = "20141204"
		desc = "Hit on RTF files by triggering on RTF file magic"

	strings:
		$rtf = { 7B 5C 72 74 66 }

	condition:
		$rtf at 0
}

}

rule_metadata.name: ft_swf_zws
rule_metadata.author: Jason Batchelor
rule_metadata.desc: File type signature for SWF files compressed with LZMA compression, uncommonly observed

rules.rule_text:

{
	meta:
		author = "Jason Batchelor"
		company = "Emerson"
		lastmod = "20150318"
		desc = "File type signature for SWF files compressed with LZMA compression, uncommonly observed"

	condition:

}

rule_metadata.name: ft_tar
rule_metadata.author: Jason Batchelor
rule_metadata.desc: Signature to detect on TAR archive files

rules.rule_text:
rule ft_tar
{
	meta:
		author = "Jason Batchelor"
		company = "Emerson"
		lastmod = "20151116"
		desc = "Signature to detect on TAR archive files"

	strings:
		$magic = { 75 73 74 61 72 }

	condition:
		$magic at 257
}

rule_metadata.name: ft_zip
rule_metadata.author: Jason Batchelor
rule_metadata.desc: File type signature for basic ZIP files.

rules.rule_text:
rule ft_zip
{
	meta:
		author = "Jason Batchelor"
		company = "Emerson"
		lastmod = "20141217"
		desc = "File type signature for basic ZIP files."

	strings:
		$pk = { 50 4B 03 04 }

	condition:
		$pk at 0
}

rule_metadata.name: compressed_exe_in_zip
rule_metadata.author: Jason Batchelor
rule_metadata.desc: Detect on evidence of a compressed executable within a ZIP

rules.rule_text:
rule compressed_exe_in_zip
{
	meta:
		author = "Jason Batchelor"
		company = "Emerson"
		lastmod = "20150813"
		desc = "Detect on evidence of a compressed executable within a ZIP"

	strings:
		$pk = { 50 4B 03 04 }
		$exe_ext = ".exe"

	condition:
		$pk at 0 and for any p in ( 1 .. #pk ) : ( $exe_ext in ( @pk [ p ] + 30 .. @pk [ p ] + 30 + uint16( @pk [ p ] + 26 ) ) )
}

rule_metadata.name: misc_hexascii_pe_in_html
rule_metadata.author: Jason Batchelor
rule_metadata.description: Detect on presence of hexascii encoded executable inside scripted code section of html file

rules.rule_text:
rule misc_hexascii_pe_in_html : encoding html suspicious
{
	meta:
		author = "Jason Batchelor"
		created = "2016-03-02"
		modified = "2016-03-02"
		university = "Carnegie Mellon University"
		description = "Detect on presence of hexascii encoded executable inside scripted code section of html file"

	strings:
		$html_start = "<html>" ascii nocase
		$html_end = "</html>" ascii nocase
		$mz = "4d5a" ascii nocase
		$pe = "50450000" ascii nocase

	condition:
		all of ( $html* ) and $pe in ( @mz [ 1 ] .. filesize )
}

rule_metadata.name: misc_no_dosmode_header
rule_metadata.author: Jason Batchelor
rule_metadata.description: Detect on absence of 'DOS Mode' heaader between MZ and PE boundries

rules.rule_text:
rule misc_no_dosmode_header : suspicious
{
	meta:
		author = "Jason Batchelor"
		created = "2016-03-02"
		modified = "2016-03-02"
		university = "Carnegie Mellon University"
		description = "Detect on absence of 'DOS Mode' heaader between MZ and PE boundries"

	strings:
		$dosmode = "This program cannot be run in DOS mode."

	condition:
		ft_strict_exe and not $dosmode in ( 0x3C .. ( uint32( 0x3C ) ) )
}

rule_metadata.name: misc_ooxml_core_properties
rule_metadata.author: Jason Batchelor
rule_metadata.desc: Identify meta xml content within OOXML documents

rules.rule_text:
rule misc_ooxml_core_properties
{
	meta:
		author = "Jason Batchelor"
		company = "Emerson"
		lastmod = "20150505"
		desc = "Identify meta xml content within OOXML documents"

	strings:
		$xml = "<?xml version="
		$core = "<cp:coreProperties xmlns:cp"

	condition:
		$xml at 0 and $core
}

rule_metadata.name: misc_pe_signature
rule_metadata.author: Jason Batchelor
rule_metadata.desc: Triggers if an authenticode signature is present within a PE file (if the PE is signed for example)

rules.rule_text:
import "pe"

rule misc_pe_signature
{
	meta:
		author = "Jason Batchelor"
		company = "Emerson"
		lastmod = "20150911"
		desc = "Triggers if an authenticode signature is present within a PE file (if the PE is signed for example)"

	condition:
		pe.number_of_signatures> 0
}

rule_metadata.name: misc_upx_packed_binary
rule_metadata.author: Jason Batchelor
rule_metadata.desc: Detect section names indicative of UPX packed PE files

rules.rule_text:
import "pe"

rule misc_upx_packed_binary
{
	meta:
		author = "Jason Batchelor"
		company = "Emerson"
		lastmod = "20150520"
		desc = "Detect section names indicative of UPX packed PE files"

	condition:
		(pe.sections [ 0 ] . name == "UPX0" and pe.sections [ 1 ] . name == "UPX1" )
}
